# LIMRA Overseas Education

> LIMRA Overseas Education is a Chennai-based medical education consultancy with 24+ years of experience, having guided 2000+ students to become doctors. LIMRA represents six NMC-aligned, English-medium partner medical universities in the Philippines and Timor-Leste, and runs South India's No.1 FMGE coaching (92% pass rate over the past decade). Services span free counselling, admissions and student visa, travel and accommodation, and FMGE/FMG Exam preparation.

## Key facts
- Experience: 24+ years; 2000+ students guided to becoming doctors.
- FMGE coaching: 92% pass rate over the past decade; 800 hours of training across 19 subjects; 50 mock tests; FMG Exam training worth Rs 1,00,000 (provided completely FREE for all enrolled students).
- Partner countries: Philippines and Timor-Leste (six universities, all NMC-aligned and English-medium).
- Philippines vs Timor-Leste: The Philippines offers a mature, American-style medical curriculum with established infrastructure and clinical exposure (DMSF, Brokenshire, Lyceum, GCM). Timor-Leste is an emerging hub offering lower living costs and direct flights from India, while maintaining identical WHO/NMC syllabus standards (UCTS, University of PEACE).
- Tuition & Fees: Total packages (including tuition, accommodation, and FMGE coaching) are highly competitive, typically ranging between ₹15 Lakhs to ₹25 Lakhs total depending on the university and duration. LIMRA strictly enforces a NO DONATION policy.
- Eligibility: Indian students must qualify NEET to study MBBS abroad and to be eligible for medical licensure in India; the FMGE must be cleared to practise in India.
- Location: New No.177, Royapettah High Road, 1st Floor, SMS Centre, Mylapore, Chennai 600004, India.
- Contact: +91-94443 75000 / +91-94457 83333. Counselling is free.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.limraedu.com/): Overview of LIMRA's services, partners, and FMGE coaching.
- [About](https://www.limraedu.com/about.html): History, mission, and 24-year track record.
- [Partner Colleges](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges.html): The six partner medical universities.
- [FMGE Coaching](https://www.limraedu.com/coaching.html): South India's No.1 FMG Exam coaching programme.
- [Medical Tourism](https://www.limraedu.com/medical-tourism.html): Hospital matching and treatment coordination abroad.
- [Gallery](https://www.limraedu.com/gallery.html): Graduation and campus photos.
- [News & Insights](https://www.limraedu.com/blog.html): Articles on MBBS abroad, FMGE, and NMC guidelines.
- [Contact](https://www.limraedu.com/contact.html): Enquiry form, phone numbers, and Chennai office address.

## Partner universities
- [Lyceum Northwestern University](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges/lyceum.html) — Dagupan, Philippines.
- [Davao Medical School Foundation](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges/dmsf.html) — Davao, Philippines.
- [Brokenshire College](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges/brokenshire.html) — Davao, Philippines.
- [Gullas College of Medicine](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges/gcm.html) — Cebu, Philippines.
- [Universidade Catolica Timorense](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges/ucts.html) — Dili, Timor-Leste.
- [University of PEACE](https://www.limraedu.com/colleges/university-of-peace.html) — Dili, Timor-Leste.
